title: Castlevania: Dracula X
prompt: Original pixel art illustration inspired by a 16-bit gothic action platformer. A lone vampire hunter with a long coat and a raised whip stands in a moonlit castle window hall, facing a towering gothic arch and distant storm clouds. Visual focus: one clear hero silhouette, one haunted castle landmark, dramatic moonlight, readable in one second. Style: Super Nintendo pixel art, rich 16-bit palette, crisp sprite-like shading, clean silhouette, layered background depth, no blur, no painterly rendering. Mood: ominous, heroic, nocturnal. Composition: centered hunter in foreground, cathedral window and moon behind, minimal clutter. Important: no logos, no text, no exact official character costume, no direct copying of game art, keep it original but strongly evocative.
negative_prompt: text, logo, watermark, official castlevania character design, exact costume replication, box art recreation, realistic painting, blurry modern illustration
